videoSnippet.title: "Never Play f6" || Wesley vs Magnus || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournamentsDownload Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

So, Wesley (2753) - Carlsen, Magnus (2841)
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [18] 2026.06.04
B42 Sicilian, Kan, 5.Bd3

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 e6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 a6 5.Bd3 Nc6 6.Nxc6 dxc6 7.Nd2 e5 8.Nc4 Be6 9.Qh5 Bxc4 10.Bxc4 Qe7 11.Qe2 g6 12.h4 Bh6 13.Bxh6 Nxh6 14.O-O-O Ng8 15.h5 Nf6 16.hxg6 fxg6 17.g3 Rd8 18.f4 Rxd1+ 19.Rxd1 Kf8 20.f5 Kg7 21.g4 h6 22.Be6 Rd8 23.Rh1 Nh7 24.Kb1 g5 25.Qh2 Qf6 26.c3 Nf8 27.Bb3 Rd6 28.a4 a5 29.Qf2 Nd7 30.Qa7 Qd8 31.Qxb7 Qb6 32.f6+ Kg6 33.Qc8 Nxf6 34.Qf8

00:38 Game Starts!
02:00 Completely New Game (Bxc4)
09:20 IWITP
10:00 STANDINGS AFTER ROUND 9
